title: [29. Rastreabilidade e auditoria] Cada execução possui erros. · Cada relatório referencia runs de origem. · Mudanças manuais são auditáveis. (+5 more)
rollback_plan: Revert last main commit(s) with reverse commit if needed; never force-push; never update DoD on failure.
notes: Provisional implementation of run_execution_ledger landed on PR #50 branch BEFORE @po Ready — process debt. Ledger is wired into resilient_cycle + crawler_monitor. Full SDC requires: @po Ready → enforce implement → InReview → independent @qa → @po close. PR recommendation is BLOCKED_HUMAN.

blockers.detail: code landed while Draft — human must accept or rework under Ready
